title: Warn against shared mode for feature tests
prompt: Write `docs/feature_tests_shared_warning.md` explaining when feature/end-to-end tests should NOT use shared mode. Must state: (1) feature tests often spawn browser driver processes that don't hold a sandbox allowance, (2) shared mode gives up concurrency, (3) prefer Phoenix.Ecto.SQL.Sandbox plug for browser-driven tests via metadata headers, (4) reserve shared mode for tests that truly cannot use allow/3.
tier_rationale: Reference doc with conceptually separated concerns (feature vs unit vs integration).
